summary: Weekly Coach Digest V1 - Complete Testing. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All DigestPanel features verified on Roster page. Digest generation, result display, history toggle, and director-only access all working correctly.

minor.issue: Email delivery fails in test mode (expected - Resend API test mode limitation)
minor.note: Digest is still generated and stored with delivery_status='failed', which is correct behavior

critical_code_review_comments: Digest data assembly correctly pulls from multiple sources: users collection (coach activation), athlete_notes (notes), ATHLETES_NEEDING_ATTENTION mock data, ownership cache (unassigned), UPCOMING_EVENTS mock data
summary_data snapshot is properly stored in digests collection with all required fields
what_changed text is dynamically generated based on actual data
History endpoint correctly sorts by sent_at descending
403 access control properly implemented for both backend (raises HTTPException) and frontend (redirects to mission-control)
seed_data_creation: Multiple digests created during testing, stored in digests collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Digest V1 fully verified. Key endpoints: POST /api/digest/generate (director-only, assembles data, sends email via Resend, stores digest record), GET /api/digest/history (returns past digests sorted by sent_at desc), GET /api/digest/{digest_id} (returns full digest detail with summary_data snapshot). Frontend: DigestPanel component on Roster page (director-only page). Data-testids: digest-panel, digest-send-btn, digest-result, digest-history-toggle, digest-history-list. Email delivery fails in Resend test mode but digest data is correctly assembled and stored. The digest includes: coach_summary (total, status_counts, coaches_needing_support, new_coaches), notes (total, by_coach, by_category), athletes_needing_attention (snapshot), unassigned_athletes, upcoming_events, nudges_sent. Period is last 7 days from generation time.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/digest/generate - returns summary with what_changed, coach_count, needs_support, notes_this_week, athletes_attention, unassigned ✓
POST /api/digest/generate - stores full summary_data snapshot in digests collection ✓
GET /api/digest/history - returns past digests sorted by sent_at desc ✓
GET /api/digest/history - includes correct record structure (id, sent_by_name, recipients, period_start, period_end, delivery_status, sent_at) ✓
GET /api/digest/{digest_id} - returns full digest with summary_data snapshot ✓
Digest data assembly: coach_count matches coach_summary.total ✓
Digest data assembly: needs_support matches coaches_needing_support length ✓
Digest data assembly: athletes_attention matches snapshot length ✓
Digest data assembly: unassigned matches unassigned_athletes length ✓
frontend_components: DigestPanel has Send Digest button with data-testid='digest-send-btn' ✓
Clicking Send Digest triggers API call and shows toast notification ✓
Toast shows 'Digest generated but email delivery failed' (expected in test mode) ✓
After send, summary result appears below button with what_changed text ✓
Summary result shows stats: X coaches, Y notes this week, Z needing attention ✓
History toggle button shows/hides past digest records ✓
History list shows date, status icon, sender name, and summary stats ✓
DigestPanel is NOT visible to coaches (roster page redirects to mission-control) ✓
Coach access to /roster returns 403 from backend APIs ✓

mocked_api_note: Resend email API is in test mode - email delivery intentionally fails but all digest data is correctly assembled and stored with delivery_status='failed'. This is expected behavior for testing.

digest_record_structure_verified.summary_data: Full snapshot of all digest data sections
